case_title: CATRY LIU VS. CASSIDY COWGER ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, CATRY AKA CATHY LIU AS TO DEFENDANT COWGER, CASSIDY ALVAREZ, JOSHUA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, CATRY AKA CATHY LIU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COWGER, CASSIDY ALVAREZ, JOSHUA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT ISSUE $7,900.00 RENT, $575.00 COSTS, $426.64 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,901.64, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
